name: Call out impostors
description:
Do you trust your bocal when they say they succeeded the piscine ? Aren't they looking 'sus ?
Heap up a serving of revenge by making the Bocal do a Piscine project together and getting them to be evaluated by the students.
Can they do it? Nobody knows, but we're gonna find out.

Signed by the most creative bocal members.
(WARNING : you have to bring your OWN tee-shirt to be dedicated. And maybe the bocal will destroy it. Maybe. Or maybe not. Who knows?)

name: Custom Slack emoji
description: Add your own custom emoji to your Slack's team. Ask your pedago team after the purchase.

name: 42 SEOUL 노트북 파우치
description:
애지중지 소중한 맥북이 상할까 걱정이 많으셨죠?

그렇다면 이 파우치를 구매해보세요!

1) 가죽 소재의 세로 타입 파우치

2) 외부 기준 가로: 41cm, 세로 29cm로 17인치까지 수납 가능

3) 생활 방수 기능 및 스크래치 방지용 내피 원단 사용으로 안전하게 보관 가능

name: Livro "O Guia Definitivo do Mochileiro das Galáxias"
description:
Pegue sua toalha, embarque nessa aventura improvável e, é claro, não entre em pânico! 

OBS:Este livro reúne em um único volume os cinco livros da cultuada série O Mochileiro das Galáxias, de Douglas Adams.
O Guia do Mochileiro das Galáxias
O Restaurante no Fim do Universo
A Vida, o Universo e Tudo Mais
Até Mais, e Obrigado Pelos Peixes!
Praticamente Inofensiva

description: Pour your favorite hot beverage into this 1337 mug and enjoy your break. After ordering from the shop, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Custom Title
description: Custom title on the intranet, send a mail to pedago@42campus.domain to choose your title

name: Beer2peer
description: Nada mejor que una conversación beer2peer. Reserva con el staff de tu elección media hora en la que estará plenamente a tu disposición. Puedes elegir cómo emplear el tiempo a tu gusto (bajo condiciones a hablar con el staff en cuestión).

name: Apertura forzada
description: ¿Escasez de puntos? ¡Abre la piscina! Aunque ten en cuenta lo siguiente: no se lanzará llena; utilizará la cantidad almacenada en ese momento.

name: $RANDOM
description: De la lista de objetos que estén disponibles en ese momento en la tienda, uno saldrá elegido aleatoriamente. El staff te contactará para confirmarte el objeto en cuestión.

name: Lluvia de puntos
description: Durante las próximas 2 semanas, el número de puntos de coalición que recibes se multiplicará x1.5.

name: ¡A los indios!
description: Una coalición se enemistará con los indios, y la única forma de recuperar su confianza es entregando proyecto. Los indios, que son muy enfadadizos, se enemistarán con otra de las dos coaliciones que deberá igualmente entregar proyecto. Pasadas 24 horas, la coalición que no consiga deshacerse de su enfado, se enfrentará a un ataque de los indios y perderá muchos puntos de coalición. Como hasta pasadas 24 horas los indios no empiezan su ataque, no sabrás sobre qué coalición caerá la ira de los indios.

name: Coleccionista
description: Eres de los que busca el 112% en una partida de Hollow Knight, o el 100% de los logros de 42. Con este objeto, puedes desbloquear el logro EXCLUSIVO más viejo que te falte.

name: Fotogénico
description: Las fotos no son lo tuyo; no te preocupes... Con este objeto puedes cambiar tu foto de la Intranet. Deberá respetar unas sencillas reglas: debe aparecer tu cara descubierta y debe ser en un campus de 42. Seguro que ahora tu perfil mola más.

name: Ladrón de guante azul
description: Con tus ilimitadas habilidades de ladrón robas un punto de la piscina para tu propio beneficio. Podrás robar un punto siempre que tengas menos de 5.

name: ¡Reroll!
description: Deepthought tuvo motivos al asignarte a tu coalición. Si aún así no estás de acuerdo, puedes comprar este objeto y elegir la coalición a la que quieres pertenecer. Date prisa, solo podrás comprar este objeto durante tus primeros 30 días como estudiante.

name: Revenge Served In Code
description: Heap up a serving of revenge by making the Bocal do a Piscine project together and getting them to be evaluated by the students. Can they do it? I don't know, but we're gonna find out.

name: Fly The Coop
description: Hop on board the nearest spaceship and get out of your galaxy and into a new one. Choose wisely - there's no return flight, and you can only make this journey once!

name: EVALUATE!
description: EVALUATE! EVALUATE! Get 3 evaluation slots for a time that suits you and 3 evaluation points. Your chance to defeat those pesky projects is now.

name: We Love Benny
description: Loving Benny is a full time job. Make sure people know you're putting in the hours by getting a custom Benny t-shirt. Provide the image of your favourite Benny, and we'll print it.

name: Techie Talk
description: Lunch with Annette? Heck yeah. Spend time with her and find out what life's like in the world of being a 42 Bocal member and programmer.

name: Pimp My Profile
description: Get a 40-minute session with one of the Bocal to review your LinkedIn and external profile to make sure it's tip top, and give you useful tips!

name: Tag Line
description: Add a customized title to your intra profile, validated by Bocal. 42 Characters maximum!

name: Feel The Need For Speed
description: Get the Bocal wifi password for a speedy connection. Let's hope it doesn't fluctuate too badly.

name: I Need Caffeine
description: One of the Bocal team will make you a coffee or tea of your choice. They'll even drink one with you if you fancy.

name: Memory Please
description: MORE. Double your storage - from 5GB to 10GB!

name: Looking Fancy
description: Get an amazing haircut from Jazz and Mel on behalf of the Bocal - no cut and colour is off limits, and they'll make the choice! Buy at your own risk.

name: Popcorn Ready
description: Host a movie and games night with your friends (who may or may not be from the school). Chat with Bocal to organise the details and get it happening!

name: Boost My Image
description:
Change your intranet photo to a photo or GIF of your choosing!*

*Approval by Bocal required.

description:

*Image and day must be approved by bocal.

description: You can rent the book "The Art of Game Design" by Jesse Schell for 1 month

name: Rent the book for 1 month - "Atomic habits"
description: You can rent the book "Atomic Habits" by James Clear for 1 month

name: Rent the book for 1 month - "Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind"
description: You can rent the book "Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind" by Yuval Noah Harari for 1 month

name: Mentorship - Vahram Martirosyan
description: You will have an opportunity to meet with Vahram Martirosyan (most possibly online) and discuss with him questions that interest you. You will have up to 4 hours in the next 3 months to talk to him.

name: Mentorship - Albert Manukyan
description: You will have an opportunity to meet with Albert Manukyan (most possibly online) and discuss with him questions that interest you. You will have up to 4 hours in the next 3 months to talk to him.

name: Mentorship - Mike Yan
description: You will have an opportunity to meet with Mike Yan (most possibly online) and discuss with him questions that interest you. You will have up to 4 hours in the next 3 months to talk to him.

name: Course for Blind Typing
description: This is an online course for blind typing. You will learn to blind type on Englsih

name: Carrier adviser - 1 hour consultation with "Meettal" Tech Recruitment company
description: You will meet with the company's representative and have a 1-hour consultation, where he/she will advise about your carrier in the IT industry.

name: Mouse pad with 42 Yerevan logo
description: Buy a mouse pad with 42 Yerevan logo, but please remember, you can't take them out of the campus. You can use it only here.

name: Game "GO"
description: You can buy and donate "GO" to 42 Yerevan. Your name will be written on the desk.

name: Chess
description: You can buy and donate chess to 42 Yerevan. Your name will be written on the desk.

name: Yerevan Ride 1 month membership
description: You can activate this membership and have unlimited 45-minute rides in one month. It works only for regular bikes.

name: Rent the book for 1 month - "Steve Jobs" by Walter Isaacson
description: You can rent the book "Steve Jobs" by Walter Isaacson for 1 month

name: 25% sale card from "Quest Project Isolation"
description: You can make a team of 5-6 people and play a quest at "Quest Project Isolation" with 25% sale. Please be aware that you must use it until the 3rd of July.

name: 50% sale card from "Quest Project Isolation"
description: You can make a team of 5-6 people and play a quest at "Quest Project Isolation" with a 50% sale. Please be aware that you must use it until the 3rd of July.

name: Gift card from "Quest Project Isolation"
description: You can make a team of 5-6 people and play a quest at "Quest Project Isolation". Please be aware that you must use it until the 3rd of July.

name: Tour to PicsArt
description: We will visit our neighbor downstairs, which is one of the most successful IT companies in Armenia.

name: English lessons
description: A test will detect everyone's level and you will be divided into groups according to it. The lessons will continue for 3 months, 3 times a week, 1.5 hours each.

name: Your movie in TUMO’s cinema
description: Choose a date and the staff will reserve the cinema for you if it's available. Choose a movie (must be accepted by the staff members) and enjoy it alone or with your 42 friends. You are permitted to bring only 1 outsider.

name: 42SEOUL Intra 명예 칭호

name: Professional photoshoot
description: A professional photographer will take your photos, which will help to create a good image by including the photo in your CV, LinkedIn page, etc.

name: Recommendation letter
description:
A personalized recommendation letter from 42 Yerevan manager Hovhannes Ispirian. 
You can buy this item now, but it will be created and given to you only when you need it, for example when applying for a job.

- 에어팟 등을 걸 수 있는 내부 고리

name: Mentoria com Empreendedor
description: Você quer desenvolver um comportamento empreendedor? Quer empreender, mas tem alguns receios? Está empreendendo, mas precisa alinhar alguns pontos? Borá bater um papo com o Daniel Murta, fundador da Jusbrasil! Daniel é engenheiro de formação e empreendedor de coração. Adora misturar amizade e negócios e procura sempre trabalhar com o que o faz feliz!

name: Bracelet collector 19
description: Noire sur blanc, il claque

name: ステッカーパック
description:
ステッカーパック
(全6種類のステッカーが入ってます。)

name: Hive homemade mug
description: Pour your favorite hot beverage in this homemade Hive mug and enjoy a well-deserved break. They have been made with love by one of your peer's mother ♡. After ordering from the shop, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Test
description: Testing Product

name: Workshop de GIT
description: Cansou de dar commit na master? Cansou de resolver um monte de conflito a cada merge request? Seus problemas acabaram: Workshop de Git na vida real. Aprenda com profissionais da área como eles usam o Git da maneira certa para melhorar seu fluxo de trabalho em equipe.

name: Workshop de Cloud com AWS
description: Bóra colocar as mãos na massa (ou melhor, na nuvem) com os técnicos super feras da AWS.

name: Pimp my LinkedIn
description: Essa é para você que quer dar um tapa no seu LinkedIn e deixar ele bonitão. Comprando essa recompensa, você vai receber uma assessoria individual de 40min com a Mari, para olhar ponto a ponto e deixar sua página tinindo.

name: Смена коалиции в Intra
description: Пересмотр результатов Сортирующей Шляпы

name: Свитшот

인트라 사진을 바꿀 수 있습니다.
(직접 촬영, 사진파일로 대체 가능)

name: 42 SEOUL  logo Hood zip-up (3XL)
description: 모자가 달려 있고, 지퍼로 열고 닫을 수 있게 되어있고 왼쪽 가슴에 42 로고가 있는 상의

name: 42 SEOUL Welcome Hood zip-up
description: 찬바람이 불어 오는 이 시점 입기 딱 좋은 'long time ago, 웰컴 후드'가 가을맞이로 돌아왔습니다. 잔여수량이 풀리는 것이라 사이즈가 한정적입니다. 현장에서 잔여 사이즈 수량 확인하시고 구매 부탁드립니다. (+1~3기 여러분께서는 이미 있으시니, 4기를 위해 양보 부탁드리옵니다!)

name: Workshop "AI com Kunumi"
description: Que tal colocar a mão na massa com a Kunumi e entender como começar a trabalhar com AI? De quebra, os participantes desse workshop poderão aplicar para 3 vagas de bolsa-pesquisa do novo Lab42AI + Kunumi.

name: Workshop "como escolher onda para empreender"
description: Esse é para quem tem vontade de empreender mas não sabe muito bem qual onda escolher. Nesse workshop o Gui Decourt vai bater um papo com outros investidores experientes e trazer dicas valiosas para você escolher um modelo de negócio sustentável.

name: Stardew Valley
description: Você herdou a antiga fazenda do seu avô em Stardew Valley. Armado com ferramentas de entrega rápida e algumas moedas, você começa sua nova vida! Ao escolher essa recompensa, você ganha um voucher para comprar o Stardew Valley no Steam! ;)

name: 42 SEOUL  logo Mouse-mat
description: 마우스를 더욱 42스럽고 42하게 움직일 수 있도록 보조하는 제품입니다.

name: 42 SEOUL logo T-shirts
description: 경구가 만든 티샤스+홀리 화이트 에디션

name: FOTO DA INTRA
description: É intra ou insta? Agora sua foto pode ter um fundo todo especial, com uma seleção de destinos turísticos ou quem sabe até uma vista de cima do nosso planeta.

name: TÍTULO NA INTRA
description: Que tal um título diferentão para adornar seu nome? “Surfista espacial”, “especialista em pudim”, ou quem sabe: “tradutor de Pajubá”? Aí é sua criatividade é quem manda!

name: Friends of Tomorrow (FoT)
description: UMA EXPERIÊNCIA QUE VAI MUDAR A SUA RELAÇÃO COM O FUTURO:  O curso que vai ampliar a sua forma de enxergar o futuro, o trabalho, as empresas – e, principalmente: sua própria vida. Espaço que vai colocar você em contato com ideias verdadeiramente novas. Muito além de uber e airbnb. Muito além de bitcoin. Muito além dos últimos cases de inteligência artificial e realidade virtual.

name: Call com Founder
description: DISCUTA SUAS IDÉIAS DE NEGÓCIOS COM O CRIADOR DO PRIMEIRO UNICÓRNIO BRASILEIRO: Ariel Lambrecht foi co-fundador da 99 e da Yellow. Apaixonado por empreendedorismo, tecnologia e inovação, ele está sempre antenado com as grandes oportunidades que as mudanças do mundo estão gerando... e está super interessado em ajudar os cadetes da 42 a também entrarem no caminho do empreendedorismo! Que tal testar suas ideias de negócios com essa fera? Bom, esta hora chegou! ;-)

name: Mentoria com CTO
description: Essa é pra você que está afim de tirar dúvidas sobre carreira com um CTO experiente. Adquirindo essa recompensa, você vai poder trocar uma ideia com Anderson Borges, CTO da Clickbus. O Anderson é líder de tecnologia com mais de 13 anos do mercado de TI, especializado em implementação e coordenação de Metodologia Ágil (Scrum, XP, Lean, Kanban e DevOps) para times com mais de 100 pessoas.

name: Headphones
description: Listen to your best tunes or podcasts and even answer calls while doing it with these headphones!  After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Hive stickers
description: Pimp your favourite items with a pack of 7 Hive branded stickers! After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Ping-pong table reservation (1 hour)
description: Tired of having to wait for your turn with the ping-pong table? Make a one hour reservation for you and your friends. After ordering, contact the bocal to set up a time.

name: Apple magic mouse and keyboard
description: Write some magical things with these bluetooth Apple mouse and keyboard (Finnish layout). After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Lunch DJ
description: Play your best tunes in the event space during lunch time for a day! After ordering, contact the bocal to set up a date.

name: Reaktor tote bag
description: Carry your most precious items in this 100% cotton Reaktor tote bag! After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Hive notebook
description: Is your future written in this notebook? Find out now by acquiring this 80 pages awesome product made out of recycled materials. After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Hive mouse pads
description: Take a little piece of the school with you and start rebuilding the Hive's clusters at home by adopting a school-themed mouse pad. After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item and choose the design according to the available stocks.

name: Hive antistress ball
description: Unload your excess of energy and work your hand muscles with this foamy ball. After ordering, come to the Bocal to get your item.

name: Wolt Voucher
description: You're a little hungry and you really don't feel like cooking? Enjoy a 20 euros worth good meal delivered by Wolt. After ordering from the intra shop, contact Niklas on Slack to receive your voucher.

name: Staff TIG
description: Give a TIG to a staff member

name: A Message in a Bottle

description:

Одним з ключових спікерів буде Джек Ма – засновник Alibaba Group.

name: Double boost - storage

name: Facebook - Security Key
description:
The Security Key by Yubico simplifies your login and secures your account on hundreds of services like Gmail, Facebook, Skype, Outlook, Dashlane and more. Usernames and passwords are not enough to protect your accounts. Using a security key as a form of two-factor authentication is a simple and proven method for locking down your accounts and keeping them secure.

.. because security is masters for facebook

name: iForum 2018
description:
Конференція iForum – це дев’ять основних напрямів з тематичними виступами, які проходять одночасно в декількох залах. Після офіційного відкриття на головній сцені, доповіді тривають безперервно протягом усього дня. Цього року у програмі представлені такі напрями:

Інтернет-Бізнес, Стартапи, Реклама і Просування, Інтернет-Технології, Освітні технології майбутнього, Інновації, Блокчейн, Digital Fun, CRM.

Між залами розміщена Експозона зі стендами компаній, а також є спеціалізована територія “Місто Майбутнього”. У ньому можна побачити і випробувати новітні розробки, які вже змінюють наше життя на краще.

name: Міжнародний Форум “INNOVATION MARKET” 21-24 листопада
description:
http://innovationmarket.com.ua/

Міжнародний Форум “INNOVATION MARKET” (МФІМ) 21-24 листопада 2017р. – місце зустрічі новаторів, винахідників, виробників провідних інноваційних технологій, авторів Startup- проектів з представниками підприємств – потенційних споживачів, зацікавлених в технологічному оновленні виробничих процесів, акселераторами інвестиційних проектів, експертами в різних галузях економіки, консультантами у сфері захисту інтелектуальної власності, представниками авторитетних інвестиційно-фінансових установ України та Китаю, з політичними лідерами України.

name: Квитки на зустріч із Стівом Возняком

name: Jacuzzi (2 hours)
description: Buy yourself and up to 3 friends of yours 2 hours of jacuzzi... And relax. Chill. And relax again. Meet with the bocal to validate your command. Caution : jacuzzi is accessible every day of the week between 14h and 17h only and it will always be closed on holiday (like 14th of july, for example). **We will clean the jacuzzi before you go. **

name: VIP FastPass
description: This article will allow you to avoid queuing before a party. You will have the right to cut the queue and enter the building directly, like a VIP. You're a boss, really.
